requirement_topic.en: BESS System Requirements — IEC 62933 / ST RK / GOST Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: BESS系统要求——IEC 62933 / ST RK / GOST项目验收
requirement_topic.zht: BESS系統要求——IEC 62933 / ST RK / GOST項目驗收

summary.en: Kazakhstan BESS projects may specify IEC 62933-series system requirements or corresponding ST RK / GOST adoptions for electrical energy storage systems, covering system terminology, planning, safety, performance, grid interface, operation, and test documentation. These requirements are typically applied at project design, procurement, commissioning, and owner acceptance rather than only at cell level.
summary.zh: 哈萨克斯坦BESS项目可能指定IEC 62933系列系统要求或对应ST RK / GOST采用版本，用于电能储能系统的术语、规划、安全、性能、电网接口、运行和测试文件。这些要求通常在项目设计、采购、调试和业主验收阶段适用，而不只适用于电芯层级。
summary.zht: 哈薩克斯坦BESS項目可能指定IEC 62933系列系統要求或對應ST RK / GOST採用版本，用於電能儲能系統的術語、規劃、安全、性能、電網介面、運行和測試文件。這些要求通常在項目設計、採購、調試和業主驗收階段適用，而不只適用於電芯層級。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933 series — Electrical energy storage systems
Applicable ST RK / GOST adoption of IEC 62933 where specified by the Kazakhstan project
Project-specific technical specifications and commissioning requirements

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 36558-2023 for general technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage systems connected to the power grid, GB/T 34120-2023 for PCS, GB 44240-2024 for battery safety, and GB/T 36276-2023 for battery technical requirements. These documents may not align one-to-one with IEC 62933 system documentation expectations.
summary.zh: 中国通常采用GB/T 36558-2023作为并网电化学储能系统通用技术要求，GB/T 34120-2023用于PCS，GB 44240-2024用于电池安全，GB/T 36276-2023用于电池技术要求。这些文件未必与IEC 62933系统文件要求一一对应。
summary.zht: 中國通常採用GB/T 36558-2023作為併網電化學儲能系統通用技術要求，GB/T 34120-2023用於PCS，GB 44240-2024用於電池安全，GB/T 36276-2023用於電池技術要求。這些文件未必與IEC 62933系統文件要求一一對應。

gap.en: The gap is system-level documentation rather than only component testing. Exporters should map Chinese system reports to IEC 62933 topics, provide system hazard analysis, interface definitions, control modes, availability and performance guarantees, commissioning test scripts, maintenance procedures, cyber or communication assumptions where relevant, and Russian or local-language evidence requested by the Kazakhstan buyer.
gap.zh: 差距在系统级文件，而不仅是部件测试。出口商应将中国系统报告映射至IEC 62933主题，提供系统危害分析、接口定义、控制模式、可用率和性能保证、调试测试脚本、维护程序、适用时的网络安全或通信假设，以及哈萨克斯坦买方要求的俄文或当地语言证据。
gap.zht: 差距在系統級文件，而不僅是部件測試。出口商應將中國系統報告映射至IEC 62933主題，提供系統危害分析、介面定義、控制模式、可用率和性能保證、調試測試腳本、維護程序、適用時的網路安全或通信假設，以及哈薩克斯坦買方要求的俄文或當地語言證據。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific where IEC 62933 or ST RK / GOST adoption is specified in tender, EPC, owner, insurer, or commissioning requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese grid-connection and project acceptance requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese component certificates alone are not enough for Kazakhstan IEC 62933-style project acceptance. Prepare system-level design, safety, performance, commissioning, and operation evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国部件证书本身不足以覆盖哈萨克斯坦IEC 62933式项目验收。应准备系统级设计、安全、性能、调试和运行证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國部件證書本身不足以覆蓋哈薩克斯坦IEC 62933式項目驗收。應準備系統級設計、安全、性能、調試和運行證據。
